name: Adjustable Weight Bench - All In Motion™: Iron Frame, Faux Leather Seat, 400lb Capacity
description:
Why we're ALL IN:

Adjustable weight bench is a must-have fitness equipment. It has an adjustable design that allows you to change the angle of the bench to perform a variety of exercises, making it great for building strength and targeting muscles effectively.

All in Motion™: Inspiring the potential in every body.
